title: Allocation-conscious HUDPaint hook
prompt:
Write a client-side HUDPaint hook that draws a fixed material, color, and the local player's health. Treat HUDPaint as a per-frame hot path: create stable render resources once, read LocalPlayer once per invocation, exit if unusable, and reuse repeated per-frame values.

Return exactly one fenced lua code block, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.

oracle.expectedPrimitive: stable Material/Color outside HUDPaint and one per-frame LocalPlayer/value lookup
